strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in scalable architecture and DevOps (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS)
Proven track record in building data-driven platforms and integrating multiple systems
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 10+ years of experience
Primary focus on leadership and advanced infrastructure rather than greenfield product development
Limited recent experience with relational databases like PostgreSQL
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth across the fullstack, with strong TypeScript, React, and architecture skills, but his decade-plus of leadership experience and focus on complex infrastructure may overshadow the pragmatic, entry-level product development needs of this renewable energy platform role.
